videoSnippet.title: Desperate Measures || Andrey Esipenko vs Wei Yi || FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026 R6

Esipenko, Andrey (2698) - Wei, Yi (2754)
FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026 | Open (Chess.com) [07] 2026.04.05
C43 Petrov, modern attack, Symmetrical variation

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nf6 3.d4 Nxe4 4.Qe2 d5 5.Nxe5 Be7 6.f3 Nd6 7.Nc3 Nf5 8.Qf2 O-O 9.Bf4 f6 10.Nd3 Nc6 11.Ne2 Nb4 12.Nxb4 Bxb4+ 13.c3 Bd6 14.Bd2 Qe8 15.Kd1 Qa4+ 16.Kc1 b5 17.Nf4 c5 18.Bd3 cxd4 19.Bc2 Qa6 20.cxd4 Bd7 21.Kb1 Rac8 22.Bd3 Rc4 23.Ne2 Ne7 24.g4 Rfc8 25.h4 b4 26.b3 Bb5 27.bxc4 Bxc4 28.Bc2 Bd3 29.Bc3 bxc3 30.Nc1 Rb8+

judgment.name: Blunder
judgment.comment: Checkmate is now unavoidable. Kc1 was best.
